summary: "Operational arsenal for authorized external red-team and bug-bounty recon. Concrete probes, wordlists, regexes, dorks, curl one-liners for: subdomain enum, GraphQL/Swagger/REST discovery, identity fa
preconditions: Skill offensive-osint has been invoked locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals matching offensive-osint
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow
Abort if any validation step fails
Record the outcome as a Capsule on success

_source.rationale_paper: Wang, Ren, Zhang. From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes. arXiv:2604.15097
